title: Veeva vendor scope present in cascade
description: Presence marker for the Veeva vendor scope. Canonical vendor prose lives in migration/vendor_conventions/veeva.md and is consumed by odm_to_spec.transform_with_ai() at transform time. Engine-actionable conventions for this vendor are deferred to Patch 5b.
rationale: Lets the cascade load the veeva vendor scope as a non-empty bucket, makes vendor presence visible in study_meta.conventions_engine_applied, and reserves the conventions/vendors/veeva/ namespace for 5b additions.

history.note: Created during Phase B.1b Patch 5a as a presence marker for the Veeva vendor scope. Advisory because the conventions engine operates post-transform on the OC4 spec, whereas Veeva's actual conventions (per migration/vendor_conventions/veeva.md) describe transform-time behavior — how Veeva's ODM gets shaped into an OC4 intermediate inside odm_to_spec.py. The advisory description simply asserts the scope is reachable; B.1b Patch 5b will author hybrid/structured records for the small subset of Veeva rules that have a post-transform engine analogue. F2_resolution.md sub-decision C documents the transition: markdown stays in place for AI-prompt enrichment until Phase C cutover.
